Porcupine local vendor SDK placeholder directory

Replace this folder's contents with the real pinned Porcupine Web SDK runtime files.

Expected filenames (update `src/voice/kws/porcupine-local-assets-config.js` if different):
- porcupine.js
- porcupine.wasm
- porcupine-worker.js

This placeholder version (`0.0.0-local`) is a scaffold so the local asset layout
is locked before the real SDK is added.
